top_signals.title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
top_signals.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AllianzGI Is Said in Exclusive Talks to Buy UOB Asset Management
top_signals.summary: Allianz Global Investors is in exclusive talks to buy the asset management division of Singapore’s United Overseas Bank Ltd., according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says crypto bill may have only a narrow window for passage this year
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan analysts said the crypto market structure bill, or Clarity Act, may have only a narrow window for passage this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Orla says normal operations to resume at Mexico mine
top_signals.summary: Located in Zacatecas state, Camino Rojo is one of Mexico's newer gold mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Gold price seen hitting record $4,920 as bull run resumes
top_signals.summary: Metals Focus forecasts another record year for gold as investment demand overtakes jewellery consumption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Commission decides to refer Spain and Poland to the Court of Justice of the European Union for not transposing agreed rules to strengthen the EU emissions trading system
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 04 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission decided to refer Spain to the Court of Justice of the European Union for failing to transpose the revised EU Emissions Trading System (EU ETS) Directive (Directive (EU) 2023/959) into national law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The regional differences in gasoline prices this Memorial Day
top_signals.summary: Against the backdrop of a nationwide increase in gasoline prices, regional dynamics including local supply and demand conditions, state fuel specifications, and state taxes influence the different prices drivers see at the pump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Coal remains competitive for power generation in the central United States
top_signals.summary: In the first four months of 2026, electricity, natural gas, and coal prices suggested continued favorable economics for coal generation in MISO. The dark spread of coal, the difference between the fuel costs for coal-fired generation and the wholesale electricity price, in the Midcontinent Independent System Operator (MISO) region outpaced a similar measure of revenue relative to fuel costs for natural gas-fired generators known as the spark spread.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Place your bets: Will Starmer stay in No 10 longer than England stay in the World Cup?
top_signals.summary: He’s faced a difficult few weeks amid mounting scrutiny over his team selection and doubts over his wider strategy after a string of poor performances. If England bow out at this summer’s World Cup, will he survive? No, we’re not talking about team manager, Thomas Tuchel, but the beleaguered Prime Minister Keir Starmer. It’s been [...]

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.
